config.title: Pozycja zakupu #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
'choice_ #include "L50200" 'section_ #include "L50222" 'list_* #include "50224"
'choose_opak* #include "L50606"
function fopen() : fopen = true section_fopen THIS_FILE fopen=list_fopen() page_.updateview end function
function show_stan_mag() doc_.getmodule(60136).make_raport_stanmag_ilosc_mag_prod_opak nothing , page_.root.pProdukt , page_.root.pOpak end function
QVE_REF_OPEN_FORM(CTRLID_PRODUKT,pProdukt) QVE_CURRENCY_CUSTOM_QUANTITY(CTRLID_ILOSC,page_.root.curIloscOpak,page_.root.pOpak,pJednOpak,1)
QVE_CURRENCY_CUSTOM_PRICE(CTRLID_CENA_WAL,page_.root.curCenaNettoWal,page_.root.parent.pWaluta,1) QVE_CURRENCY_CUSTOM_PRICE(CTRLID_OPL_ZAGR,page_.root.curOplatyZagr,page_.root.parent.pWaluta,1)
function c##CTRLID_ILOSCINFOTEXT##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl):c##CTRLID_ILOSCINFOTEXT##_ongetdata=true dim strText : strText = "" if not page_.root.pOpak is nothing then dim strJOName : strJOName = "" dim strJEName : strJEName = "" dim nJOPrec : nJOPrec = 2 dim nJEPrec : nJEPrec = 2
with page_.root.pOpak if not .pJednOpak is nothing then strJOName = .pJednOpak.strSkrot nJOPrec = .pJednOpak.nDokladnosc - 1 end if end with with page_.root.pProdukt if not .pJednostkaEwid is nothing then strJEName = .pJednostkaEwid.strSkrot nJEPrec = .pJednostkaEwid.nDokladnosc - 1 end if end with strText = doc_.afc.display.quantity(page_.root.curIloscOpak,strJOName,nJOPrec) + _ " to " + doc_.afc.display.quantity(page_.root.curIloscOpak * page_.root.pOpak.currKrotnosc,strJEName,nJEPrec)
end if oCtrl.text = strText end function
#ifdef ENABLE_DB13 QVX_USER_FIELDS_NAMES(CTRLID_EX1,CTRLID_EX2,CTRLID_EX3,CTRLID_EX4,CTRLID_EX5,CTRLID_EX6,CTRLID_EX7,CTRLID_EX8,CTRLID_EX9,CTRLID_EX10,CTRLID_EX11) #else QVX_USER_FIELDS_NAMES(CTRLID_EX1,CTRLID_EX2,CTRLID_EX3,CTRLID_EX4,CTRLID_EX5,CTRLID_EX6) #endif
function c##CTRLID_ZADANIE##_onsuggquery(byref pEditCtrl,byval strEnteredVal,byref strWhere,byref strOrder,byref strJoin) if page_.root.parent.pDostawca is nothing then exit function end if if strWhere <> "" then strWhere = strWhere + " and " end if strWhere = strWhere + "(pKlient = " + cstr(page_.root.parent.pDostawca.idobj) + ")" end function

page.body:
QXF_BEGIN QXS_BEGIN_FLAT(SECID_POSTAWOWE,Dane podstawowe,FORM_SPAN) QXX_EDIT_REF_PRODUKT(Produkt,CTRLID_PRODUKT,-1,40,pProdukt,CRSR_DEFAULT,RCELL_SPAN) QXX_CHOOSE_OPAKOWANIE(-1,Opakowanie,pOpak,pProdukt,RCELL_SPAN)
QXC_LABEL(Ilość,1) QXC_QUANTITY_CUSTOM(CTRLID_ILOSC,MCELL_SPAN) QXC_INFO_CUSTOM(,CTRLID_ILOSCINFOTEXT,1)
QXR_SEPARATOR(FORM_SPAN) #if FZF_SHOW_CENA_WALUTA = 1 QXR_CURRENCY_CUSTOM(Cena w walucie,CTRLID_CENA_WAL,14,2,,3) QXR_CURRENCY_CUSTOM(Opłaty dodatkowe (zagranica),CTRLID_OPL_ZAGR,14,2,,3)
QXC_LABEL(Cło,1) QXC_PRICE_FIELD(-1,14,curClo,1)
QXC_LABEL(Akcyza,1) QXC_PRICE_FIELD(-1,14,curAkcyza,1)
QXC_LABEL(Opłaty dodatkowe (kraj),1) QXC_PRICE_FIELD(-1,14,curOplatyKraj,1)
#endif
QXC_LABEL(,1) QXC_LABEL(netto,1) QXC_LABEL( ,1) QXC_LABEL(brutto,1)
#if FZF_SHOW_CENA_WALUTA = 0
QXC_LABEL(Cena zakupu,1) QXC_PRICE_FIELD(-1,14,curCenaNettoWal,1)
QXC_PRICE_FIELD(-1,14,curCenaBrutto,1)
#endif
QXC_LABEL(Wartość,1) QXX_MONEY_FIELD(-1,14,curWartNetto,1)
QXX_MONEY_FIELD(-1,14,curWartBrutto,1)
QXS_END_FLAT(FORM_SPAN)
QXS_MULTILINE(SECID_UWAGI,CTRLID_UWAGI,strUwagi,Uwagi,FORM_SPAN)
QXS_BEGIN_OPT(SECID_POWIAZANIA,Powiazania,FORM_SPAN) QXR_EDIT_REF_CQ(Zadanie,CTRLID_ZADANIE,40,PICTURE_CHOICE_N5ZADANIE,pzak_pZadanie,strTemat,RCELL_SPAN) QXS_END_OPT(FORM_SPAN)
#ifdef APPCONFIG_FUNDUSZ_ROLNO_SPOZYWCZY QXS_BEGIN_OPT(SECID_EXTRA,Pola użytkownika,FORM_SPAN)
QXC_LABEL_CUSTOM(CTRLID_EX1,15,1) QXC_EDIT_FIELD(-1,40,strExtra1,RCELL_SPAN)
QXC_LABEL_CUSTOM(CTRLID_EX3,15,1) QXC_DATE_FIELD(-1,dExtra3,RCELL_SPAN)
QXC_LABEL_CUSTOM(CTRLID_EX4,15,1) QXC_CURRENCY_FIELD(-1,20,4,,curExtra4,RCELL_SPAN)
QXC_LABEL_CUSTOM(CTRLID_EX5,15,1) QXC_CURRENCY_FIELD(-1,20,4,,curExtra5,RCELL_SPAN)
QXC_LABEL_CUSTOM(CTRLID_EX6,15,1) QXC_EDIT_REF(-1,40,PICTURE_CHOICE_ELEMENT,pKwalifikatorEX,strNazwa,CRSR_DEFAULT,RCELL_SPAN)
#ifdef ENABLE_DB13 QXX_USER_FIELDS_DB13(CTRLID_EX7,CTRLID_EX8,CTRLID_EX9,CTRLID_EX10,CTRLID_EX11,RCELL_SPAN) #endif QXS_END_OPT(FORM_SPAN) #else #ifdef _KOMPOZYTY #if appvar_rejestr_typ = N5REJESTRDOK_FAKT_ZAK || appvar_rejestr_typ = N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_FAKT_ZAK QXS_BEGIN_OPT(SECID_EXTRA,Pola użytkownika,FORM_SPAN)
QXC_LABEL_CUSTOM(CTRLID_EX1,15,1) QXC_EDIT_FIELD(-1,40,strExtra1,RCELL_SPAN)
QXC_LABEL_CUSTOM(CTRLID_EX2,15,1) QXC_EDIT_FIELD(-1,40,strExtra2,RCELL_SPAN)
QXC_LABEL_CUSTOM(CTRLID_EX3,15,1) QXC_DATE_FIELD(-1,dExtra3,RCELL_SPAN)
QXC_LABEL_CUSTOM(CTRLID_EX4,15,1) QXC_CURRENCY_FIELD(-1,20,4,,curExtra4,RCELL_SPAN)
QXC_LABEL_CUSTOM(CTRLID_EX6,15,1) QXC_EDIT_REF(-1,40,PICTURE_CHOICE_ELEMENT,pKwalifikatorEX,strNazwa,CRSR_DEFAULT,RCELL_SPAN)
#ifdef ENABLE_DB13 QXX_USER_FIELDS_DB13(CTRLID_EX7,CTRLID_EX8,CTRLID_EX9,CTRLID_EX10,CTRLID_EX11,RCELL_SPAN) #endif QXS_END_OPT(FORM_SPAN) #else #ifdef ENABLE_DB13 QXX_USER_FIELDS(SECID_EXTRA,CTRLID_EX1,CTRLID_EX2,CTRLID_EX3,CTRLID_EX4,CTRLID_EX5,CTRLID_EX6,CTRLID_EX7,CTRLID_EX8,CTRLID_EX9,CTRLID_EX10,CTRLID_EX11,FORM_SPAN,RCELL_SPAN) #else QXX_USER_FIELDS(SECID_EXTRA,CTRLID_EX1,CTRLID_EX2,CTRLID_EX3,CTRLID_EX4,CTRLID_EX5,CTRLID_EX6,FORM_SPAN,RCELL_SPAN) #endif #endif #else #ifdef ENABLE_DB13 QXX_USER_FIELDS(SECID_EXTRA,CTRLID_EX1,CTRLID_EX2,CTRLID_EX3,CTRLID_EX4,CTRLID_EX5,CTRLID_EX6,CTRLID_EX7,CTRLID_EX8,CTRLID_EX9,CTRLID_EX10,CTRLID_EX11,FORM_SPAN,RCELL_SPAN) #else QXX_USER_FIELDS(SECID_EXTRA,CTRLID_EX1,CTRLID_EX2,CTRLID_EX3,CTRLID_EX4,CTRLID_EX5,CTRLID_EX6,FORM_SPAN,RCELL_SPAN) #endif #endif #endif
QXR_SEPARATOR(FORM_SPAN)
QXE_BUTTON(CTRLID_GET_STAN_MAG,10,Pokaż dostępność,varFunction="show_stan_mag")
QXF_END
